subcodes.first_line: O ye two honourable souls! Your letter was received and its contents noted. My heart was saddened
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس محترم نامه شما رسید و مضمون معلوم و قلب محزون گردید که آن دو شخص
subcodes.subjects: @law of divorce, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
